Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Microscopes can see video on a laserdisc 533 upvotes, 72 comments
  2. Z80 Sans – a disassembler in a font (2024) 137 upvotes, 14 comments
  3. FrameBook 473 upvotes, 79 comments
  4. Artificial-life: A simple (300 lines of code) reproduction of Computational Life 137 upvotes, 20 comments
  5. Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents 685 upvotes, 161 comments
  6. Segagaga Has Been Translated into English 41 upvotes, 5 comments
  7. PCB devboard the size of a USB-C plug 220 upvotes, 52 comments
  8. Linux Internals: How /proc/self/mem writes to unwritable memory (2021) 106 upvotes, 23 comments
  9. Every single board computer I tested in 2025 191 upvotes, 61 comments
  10. FreeBSD Capsicum vs. Linux Seccomp Process Sandboxing 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  11. The Window Chrome of Our Discontent 36 upvotes, 8 comments
  12. Fontcrafter: Turn Your Handwriting into a Real Font 181 upvotes, 68 comments
  13. How the Sriracha guys screwed over their supplier 300 upvotes, 124 comments
  14. I made a programming language with M&Ms 101 upvotes, 38 comments
  15. Ireland shuts last coal plant, becomes 15th coal-free country in Europe (2025) 338 upvotes, 170 comments
  16. FFmpeg at Meta: Media Processing at Scale 54 upvotes, 22 comments
  17. Reverse-engineering the UniFi inform protocol 17 upvotes, 4 comments
  18. I love email (2023) 77 upvotes, 35 comments
  19. We Stopped Using the Mathematics That Works 69 upvotes, 32 comments
  20. Show HN: VS Code Agent Kanban: Task Management for the AI-Assisted Developer 36 upvotes, 15 comments
  21. Unlocking Python's Cores:Energy Implications of Removing the GIL 59 upvotes, 29 comments
  22. My Homelab Setup 287 upvotes, 190 comments
  23. We should revisit literate programming in the agent era 268 upvotes, 186 comments
  24. Ask HN: How to be alone? 563 upvotes, 421 comments
  25. Why can't you tune your guitar? (2019) 227 upvotes, 161 comments
  26. US Court of Appeals: TOS may be updated by email, use can imply consent [pdf] 347 upvotes, 267 comments
  27. Living human brain cells play DOOM on a CL1 [video] 225 upvotes, 213 comments
  28. My “grand vision” for Rust 234 upvotes, 235 comments
  29. Nvidia backs AI data center startup Nscale as it hits $14.6B valuation 37 upvotes, 37 comments
  30. Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (March 2026) 217 upvotes, 752 comments

Last generated 10:30pm, 9 March 2026. Source here.
